author: Video Games Chronicle
text: After being delayed, The Legend of Zelda movie has now been brought forward The film will now be released in April, according to Shigeru Miyamoto

text: With its latest update, Nintendo has already added most of Virtual Boy’s game library to Switch Online 5 new titles are available on NSO today

text: Best Buy tells affiliates it’s starting GTA 6 pre-orders next week, sparking speculation that a new trailer is coming Take-Two's next financial results are also presented next week
